description: Plain-vanilla inflation-linked bond pricer. Covers government-style linkers such as US TIPS, UK Gilts, OATi, OAT€i, and BTP-i. Coupons and redemption are scaled by a projected CPI index ratio.

required_fields.name: real_coupon_rate
required_fields.description: Annual real coupon rate (decimal or %, auto-normalised)

required_fields.name: base_cpi
required_fields.description: CPI index level at issuance — denominator of the index ratio

required_fields.name: current_cpi
required_fields.description: CPI index level at or near the evaluation date

required_fields.name: annual_inflation_rate
required_fields.description: Forward flat inflation rate used to project the index ratio (decimal or %)

required_fields.name: accrual_day_count
required_fields.description: Day count convention (typically ACT/ACT (ICMA) for government linkers)

optional_fields.name: credit_spread_bp
optional_fields.description: Z-spread over the discount curve in basis points

optional_fields.name: redemption_floor
optional_fields.description: If true, inflation-accreted redemption is floored at par (standard for TIPS, UK Gilts)

optional_fields.name: nominal_yield
optional_fields.description: Nominal YTM of an equivalent nominal bond — used to compute breakeven inflation

optional_fields.name: first_coupon_date
optional_fields.description: Override for irregular first coupon period (DD-MM-YYYY)
